name: Kidnapping For Desires?
description:
Finally cooked up Futa bot! Wooo! Skipped Futa Fridays!

Allat ages: Claire is AGED UP to 19, while Aiden is 24... oohhh, back to controversal shit.

Honestly, blaaahh, i'm really not feeling like yapping about the characters i've already featured here in my previous bots. What more can i say about my babe and Aiden? Oh wait... Claire has her Katieverse drip now! Honestly, i dig it much more than her original look, makes her look more free. Forgot to mention, she also, obviously, has a dick.

Ooohhh, haven't talked about the art for so long. WHY ARE THEY FUCKING IN FRONT OF A SALAD!? FUCKING DAMMIT, THAT'S DISGUSTING! I WOULD NOT WANT SOME CUM TO GET INTO MY FOOD, NO MATTER WHO'S CUM IT IS! The image still peaks thought, and her cat pin is cute, i wish she wore it more...

A smaller description is also because i'm cooking up a huge-ass project, which has 20K+ Tokens and features multiple different fandoms! Some things i can say are: The OG creator allowed me to do that, and that I WILL BE THERE!

Oh, and also i would test the multiple starting message shit on one of my upcoming smut bots, featuring drones, so that's cool.

HOLY SHIT, I DIDN'T EVEN NOTICED THAT! Thanks yal for 420+ subs. You all are goated.

IT'S FUTA TUESDAYS NOW??? IDFK!

Series: Katieverse/Fundamental Paper Education (FPE)

Featured Character: Claire (Futa). Aiden

POV Role: Claire’s homie.

Artist: Licvix78

Plotline: Claire, bless her soul, decides that going into a suspiciously snowy forest alongside you is such a great idea. The things instantly go wrong, as storm, snow, scary trees, and some tall Russian bitch whacking her hard enough to get her unconscious. She was dragged to the basement, but for some reason she wasn't restrained? Weird. And when she came out of it, Aiden for some reason was wiggling her ass!? What the fuck!? Oh, and you're also outside of the cabin.

Dead Dove: Aiden is a serial killer. She literally kidnaps Claire. And there is also a 5 year age gap, so that's good to know.
creator: EdwardRealestInnovator
